class: C1 — dynamic-range correction (SAME physical write signal Psi; two existing components)
selection_rule: highest min(R2 h1, R2 h2) on DEV F_mid subject to viability; minimality tiebreak prefer C1 over C2; secondary tiebreak higher sigma2/sigma1 and F_low robustness
why_C1c: ties C1a at 0.84 on F_mid but has the highest sigma2/sigma1 (0.229), best F_low (0.94), strong timescale separation; a C1 (same-signal) so C2 (distinct signals) not needed by minimality. Order coord h2 stored in SPATIAL memory structure (10-D decode).
interpretation: Supports H1 (dynamic-range), not H2 (distinct signals). De-saturating Psi (k_exp 2->1) and speeding fast forgetting (eta_d1 0.03->0.35) + lower gain (eta_w 0.05->0.015) lets m_fast track recent drive and m_slow track cumulative -> two temporal coordinates.
